markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content drafts, refresh strategy, and the Atlas workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Drafts Pending Approval:** Four drafts await final technical review from Cody's team. Allison has approved the tone, but flagged one draft as too formal and corrected a product name.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [**Atlas Workflow Explained:** Aida demoed Atlas, GrowthX's platform, to show how a multi-step AI pipeline (briefing, research, fact-checking) ensures quality and can be customized to address specific feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [**Refresh Strategy Confirmed:** The refresh list in Airtable targets articles with traffic loss or low CTR. The top-performing "Vector Databases" report is excluded due to its proprietary data.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**Partnership Check-in:** Aida will deliver a Phase 1 summary next week, triggering a formal check-in on the partnership's future.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)

## Topics

### Content Drafts: Review & Approval

  - [**Status:** Four drafts are pending final technical review from Cody's team.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [**Allison's Feedback:** Tone is good overall. One draft ("agentic rag") is too formal; comments were added to adjust.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [**Product Naming Correction:** The product name is "Redis LangCache," not "Redis Semantic Caching."](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [**Approval Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
      - [Cody's team must provide final technical approval.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [**Action:** Cody's team to comment "review done" in the Google Doc or Airtable, tagging Aida.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [**Review Cadence:** Product marketer review is expected for the first \~5–6 articles to establish a baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)

### Atlas Workflow: Ensuring Content Quality

  - [Aida demoed Atlas to show how a multi-step AI pipeline ensures content quality and can be customized.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [**Workflow Steps:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
    1.  [**Briefing:** Manual outline creation and research direction to ensure comprehensiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
    2.  [**Research:** AI uses Tavali (or EXA for complex topics) to build a detailed research document, preventing thin content.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
    3.  [**Drafting & Validation:** AI generates a draft, then a separate step validates it against writing guidelines (e.g., removing banned words, improving readability).](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
    4.  **Fact-Checking:** An AI fact-checker (powered by Tavali) verifies claims.
          - [**Process:** It extracts passages, researches them, and flags unverified stats for human review.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
    5.  [**Human Review:** Editors perform a final manual check of all links and stats before delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [**Customization:** The workflow can be tailored to address specific feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [**Example:** A "product fact-checker" step could be added to verify product mentions for accuracy and relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [**Refresh List:** The list in Airtable targets articles with significant traffic loss or low CTR over the last six months.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**Manual Selection:** The list also includes recent, underperforming articles (e.g., "agentic rag," "rag accuracy") that are not yet flagged by traffic metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [**"Vector Databases" Report:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [**Decision:** Excluded from GrowthX's refresh scope.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The article contains proprietary benchmark data that GrowthX cannot update.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Alternative:** Redis can refresh it internally by adding new, general sections.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)

### Partnership Check-in

  - [**Timeline:** The engagement is in Week 6 of an 8-week sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [**Next Week:** Aida will deliver a Phase 1 summary, which triggers a formal check-in on the partnership's future.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fung-Lin:** Instruct Cody's team to comment "review done" in the Google Doc or Airtable for approved drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [Address Allison's feedback on the "agentic rag" draft and the "Redis LangCache" product name.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [Send 5 new article drafts by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [Stage approved drafts in the CMS and tag Cody for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
      - [Deliver the Phase 1 summary next week to initiate the partnership check-in.](https://fathom.video/share/E5XnALqxNr9abuzjRZ4tQdRsc2qxh87r?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
